pip_2026-07-19.mp4.title: Pip's World Cup Final Ice Cream Press! ⚽🍦
pip_2026-07-19.mp4.description:
Experiment Log #5219: Pip-pip! Two big things today: It's the World Cup Final AND National Ice Cream Day! 🥳 I made a special soccer ball treat for the Mystical Press. The result was a total goal! 🥅✨ What delicious invention should I try next? Let me know! Pip-pip!
